# Outputs

This folder contains all generated evaluation plots and charts.

## Files (generated by running `src/evaluate.py` or Notebook 03)

| File | Description | Generated By |
|---|---|---|
| `confusion_matrix.png` | 5×5 confusion matrix heatmap | `evaluate.py` / Notebook 03 |
| `feature_importance.png` | Bar chart of 10 features ranked by Gini Gain | `evaluate.py` / Notebook 03 |
| `correlation_heatmap.png` | Pearson correlation heatmap of features | `evaluate.py` / Notebook 01 |
| `decision_tree_plot.png` | Decision tree visualization (top 4 levels) | `evaluate.py` / Notebook 03 |
| `class_distribution.png` | Bar chart of image counts per class | `evaluate.py` / Notebook 01 |

## How to Generate

```bash
# After training the model:
python src/evaluate.py
```

Or run Notebooks 01 and 03 in order.

## Expected Results

| Metric    | Value  |
|-----------|--------|
| Accuracy  | 97.33% |
| Precision | 96.91% |
| Recall    | 97.12% |
| F1-Score  | 97.01% |
